title: Crispy Pakora Pastry
description: A crispy, savory pastry filled with spiced pakora, perfect as a snack or appetizer.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Roll out the puff pastry to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Cut out squares of pastry, about 3 inches per side.
Place a tablespoon of pakora mix in the center of each square.
Fold the pastry over the filling, pressing the edges to seal.
Brush the tops with vegetable oil and sprinkle with salt and chili powder.
Place the pastries on the prepared baking sheet.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
